title: pteris sinensis
intro: Pteris sinensis, also known as Chinese fern or Chinese brake fern, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris sinensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and protecting against liver and kidney damage. Pteris sinensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
